operations.prompt: Extract the exact API URL format for retrieving data. What is the base URL? What parameters are avai...

operations.query: IMF SDMX API COFER python code example request endpoint
yfinance weekend gap FX data ffill interpolate best practice

operations.command: curl -s "https://markets.newyorkfed.org/api/rates/secured/sofr/last/3.json" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(json.dumps(d, indent=2)[:2000])"
operations.description: Test NY Fed SOFR API - get last 3 days

operations.command: curl -s "https://api.estr.dev/latest" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(json.dumps(d, indent=2))"
curl -s "https://www.bankofcanada.ca/valet/observations/AVG.INTWO/json?recent=5" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(json.dumps(d, indent=2)[:2000])"
operations.description: Test BoC Valet API for CORRA

operations.command: curl -s "http://dataservices.imf.org/REST/SDMX_JSON.svc/DataStructure/COFER" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(json.dumps(list(d.keys()), indent=2))" 2>/dev/null || echo "JSON parse failed - checking raw response"

curl -s "http://dataservices.imf.org/REST/SDMX_JSON.svc/Dataflow" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); flows = d.get('Structure',{}).get('Dataflows',{}).get('Dataflow',[]); cofer = [f for f in flows if 'COFER' in str(f)]; print(json.dumps(cofer[:3], indent=2))" 2>/dev/null || echo "Trying alternative"
operations.description: Get IMF dataflows to find COFER
Test BoE SONIA API with csv.x parameter

operations.command: curl -s "http://dataservices.imf.org/REST/SDMX_JSON.svc/CompactData/COFER/Q..?startPeriod=2024-01" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(json.dumps(d, indent=2)[:3000])" 2>/dev/null || echo "IMF COFER query failed"
operations.description: Try IMF COFER via dataservices endpoint

operations.command: curl -s "https://api.stlouisfed.org/fred/series/observations?series_id=IUDSOIA&api_key=demo&file_type=json&observation_start=2026-01-15" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(json.dumps(d.get('observations', d)[:5], indent=2))" 2>/dev/null || echo "FRED SONIA check - demo key may not work"
operations.description: Test FRED API for SONIA (with demo key)

operations.command:
python3 -c "
import yfinance as yf
# Test DXY and FX data
symbols = ['DX-Y.NYB', 'EURUSD=X', 'USDJPY=X']
data = yf.download(symbols, period='5d', progress=False)
print('Columns:', list(data.columns.get_level_values(0).unique()))
print()
print(data['Close'].tail())
" 2>/dev/null || echo "yfinance not installed in system python"
operations.description: Test yfinance for DXY and FX pairs

operations.command:
uv run python -c "
import yfinance as yf
# Test DXY and FX data
symbols = ['DX-Y.NYB', 'EURUSD=X', 'USDJPY=X']
data = yf.download(symbols, period='5d', progress=False)
print('Columns:', list(data.columns.get_level_values(0).unique()))
print()
print(data['Close'].tail())
" 2>&1 | tail -20
